title: Loyal Items
description: Your items will never despawn while waiting for your return after death
body:
Simple datapack to protect your items from despawning after 5 minutes from the character death. No more worrying that your equipment and resources will disappear while you spend too long attempting to find the place where the fatal damage parted you.
#
This datapack works unnoticeably and leaves no consequences after its removal. It doesn't contain any ticking or even loading functions, so by itself it won't affect Minecraft performance in any way.
If you want, you can enable feedback with the number of protected items using this command:
`/tag @s add get_feedback`

If you have a mod, plugin or datapack that automatically clears dropped items, you can exclude the protected items by tag `protected_from_despawn`.
